subject: Re: Quick start: tilt series tutorial has an incomple M refinement command
body:
Hi Juha,

Sorry about that - it's just an unnecessary backslash at the end, the idea
is to rerun M without any refinements but taking the new weights into
account to see if the reconstruction has improved

Cheers,

Alister

On Sun, 13 Oct 2024 at 02:43, Juha Huiskonen <juha.huiskonen@gmail.com>
wrote:

> Hi all,
>
> The command for M refinement (weights (per-tilt series)) seems incomplete:
>
> EstimateWeights \ --population m/10491.population \ --source 10491 \
> --resolve_items MCore \ --population m/10491.population \
>
> Does anyone know what is the complete command for this step?
>
> Cheers,
> Juha
>
> --
